action_set_definitions.name: fetch_simulation_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of the environment, including the simulation clock, weather conditions (wind speed/direction), and telemetry for all aircraft in the queue.

action_set_definitions.name: fetch_separation_standards
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the required time and distance separation standards between different aircraft wake categories.

lead_category.description: The wake category of the leading aircraft (e.g., 'Super').

follower_category.description: The wake category of the following aircraft (e.g., 'Heavy').

action_set_definitions.name: issue_tactical_command
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a tactical control instruction (speed, heading, or altitude) to a specific aircraft to adjust its arrival timing.

callsign.description: The unique identifier of the aircraft.

value.description: The target value for the command (e.g., knots for speed, degrees for heading).

action_set_definitions.name: update_airport_systems
action_set_definitions.description: Synchronizes the sequence changes with the AMAN (Arrival Management) system and updates the terminal broadcast notifications.

sequence_order.description: The ordered list of callsigns for the arrival sequence.

broadcast_message.description: The notification text for the terminal broadcast.

state_description.aircraft_queue: List of aircraft currently in the arrival sector, including their ID, wake turbulence category, and current flight telemetry.
state_description.runway_status: The current occupancy and last landing timestamp for each available runway to calculate separation.
state_description.simulation_clock: The current simulation time in seconds (Unix timestamp or relative seconds).
state_description.separation_requirements: Matrix defining the minimum time/distance separation required between different aircraft types (e.g., Heavy following Medium).
